title: ShiftFont
text: ShiftFont Shift the text position of Unifield or component text up or down by the specified number of pixels. Syntax ShiftFont { = } Pixels Arguments Pixels — 0 , positive, or negative integer from -5 to 5 . Default is 0 . Defaults Default value None File section [screen] Description Use the ShiftFont setting to ensure that the underline in underlined Unifields and component text is displayed correctly. For example: ShiftFont = 1 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
